Assessment Summary

Course
SIEN1000 Innovation & Entrepreneurship Foundation
Assessment
Assignment 3 — I&E Journey “Passport” Poster
Weight
35% of overall grade
Format
Poster + 3-minute audio annotation
Final poster due
Monday 18 May, 11:59 PM
Evidence batches
30 Mar + 4 May, 11:59 PM

Required Structure Detected

✓ SDG challenge / problem
✓ Personal purpose and goals
✓ Innovation & entrepreneurship approach
✓ Opportunities identified and selected
✓ Future I&E process and strategy
✓ Innovation ecosystem and stakeholders
✓ Actionable next-step plan

🎯 HD Rubric Breakdown

Poster Layout

HD target: Excellent visual layout that guides viewers logically, highlights key messages, and makes sections feel connected.

AI advice: Use clear section blocks, icons, diagrams, colour hierarchy, and concise full-sentence explanations.

Analysis

HD target: Expertly mobilise innovation and entrepreneurship concepts and seamlessly integrate them with the SDG context.

AI advice: Explicitly use opportunity framing, ecosystem, stakeholder mobilisation, responsible innovation, value creation/capture, and process model.

Purpose & Personal Goals

HD target: Convincingly justify your personal goals as an innovator or entrepreneur.

AI advice: Do not only describe feelings. Link your motivation to the SDG, your chosen activities, and your future pathway.

Future Action Plan

HD target: Clear, realistic, well-detailed, and convincingly justified next steps.

AI advice: Include timeline, specific organisations, networking actions, resources to mobilise, and risk/responsible innovation considerations.

Annotation

HD target: Clear, concise, easy to follow, professionally delivered, and seamlessly connected to your journey storyline.

AI advice: Use a 3-minute structure: 30s problem, 60s journey, 60s opportunity/process, 30s action plan and takeaway.

⚠️ High-Risk Mark-Losing Areas

⚠ Poster becomes a pretty collage but lacks analysis.
⚠ Activities are listed but not connected to your I&E journey.
⚠ SDG link is descriptive rather than analytical.
⚠ Unit concepts are named but not applied.
⚠ Future action plan is vague and not realistic.
⚠ 3-minute annotation exceeds time or lacks a clear storyline.

✅ AI Submission Checklist

📈 Estimated Performance

Current prediction: D / HD borderline

To push into HD: strengthen ecosystem analysis, justify personal goals more convincingly, and make the future action plan more specific with organisations, dates, and resources.
